name: Cherry Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the cake mix, water, and eggs. Beat with an electric beater on low.
2. In a small bowl, toss the maraschino cherries with flour until well coated.
3. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 2-quart mold or spring-form pan.
4. Drop the cherry-flour mixture into the batter from above so they sink in (this prevents the heavier cherries from sinking to the bottom).
5. Place the pan in the slow cooker and cover with a loosely fitting plate. Cover the pot, but prop the lid open slightly with a toothpick or foil to allow excess steam to escape.
6. Cook on High for 2 ½ to 3 ½ hours.
7. Test doneness by inserting a toothpick into the center; it should come out clean.
8. Remove from heat and let cool on a rack for 10 to 15 minutes before turning out of the pan. Allow to cool completely before serving.
